Package dev.morphia.critter.parser.asm

Class BaseGenerator

java.lang.Object
dev.morphia.critter.parser.asm.BaseGenerator
Direct Known Subclasses:
AddFieldAccessorMethods, AddMethodAccessorMethods
public abstract class BaseGenerator extends Object
Base class for ASM-based bytecode generators used by Critter to produce accessor and model classes.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected org.objectweb.asm.ClassWriter
    classWriter
    The ASM ClassWriter used to assemble the generated class bytecode.
    protected final org.objectweb.asm.Type
    entityType
    The ASM type of the entity class being processed.
    protected org.objectweb.asm.Type
    generatedType
    The ASM type of the class being generated.
    protected int
    lineNumber
    The current source line number used when emitting debug line-number instructions.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
    protected
    BaseGenerator(Class<?> entity)
    Creates a new generator for the given entity class.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected int
    accessFlags()
    Returns the access flags used when declaring the generated class.
    abstract byte[]
    emit()
    Emits the generated or augmented class bytecode.
    protected org.objectweb.asm.Label
    label(org.objectweb.asm.MethodVisitor mv)
    Creates a new label, visits it, and emits a line-number debug instruction using the current line number.
    protected org.objectweb.asm.Label
    label(org.objectweb.asm.MethodVisitor mv, int lineNumber)
    Creates a new label, visits it, and emits a line-number debug instruction.
    protected org.objectweb.asm.Label
    label(org.objectweb.asm.MethodVisitor mv, int lineNumber, boolean visit)
    Creates a new label and optionally visits it with a line-number debug instruction.
    protected org.objectweb.asm.Label
    labelNoVisit(org.objectweb.asm.MethodVisitor mv)
    Creates a new label without visiting it on the method visitor.
    protected org.objectweb.asm.MethodVisitor
    method(int access, String name, String descriptor, String signature, String[] exceptions, int lineNumber)
    Visits a method on the class writer and records the starting line number.
    protected void
    readClassFiltering(Class<?> entity)
    Reads a class into the classWriter, filtering out any existing __read/__write synthetic methods so that accessor generation is idempotent across repeated plugin runs.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Field Details

    • classWriter

      protected org.objectweb.asm.ClassWriter classWriter
      The ASM ClassWriter used to assemble the generated class bytecode.

    • entityType

      protected final org.objectweb.asm.Type entityType
      The ASM type of the entity class being processed.

    • lineNumber

      protected int lineNumber
      The current source line number used when emitting debug line-number instructions.

    • generatedType

      protected org.objectweb.asm.Type generatedType
      The ASM type of the class being generated.

  • Constructor Details

    • BaseGenerator

      protected BaseGenerator(Class<?> entity)
      Creates a new generator for the given entity class.
      Parameters:
      entity - the entity class whose bytecode will be augmented or used as a template

  • Method Details

    • emit

      public abstract byte[] emit()
      Emits the generated or augmented class bytecode.
      Returns:
      the bytecode of the generated class

    • accessFlags

      protected int accessFlags()
      Returns the access flags used when declaring the generated class.
      Returns:
      the ACC_PUBLIC | ACC_SUPER access flags

    • readClassFiltering

      protected void readClassFiltering(Class<?> entity)
      Reads a class into the classWriter, filtering out any existing __read/__write synthetic methods so that accessor generation is idempotent across repeated plugin runs.
      Parameters:
      entity - the class to read

    • method

      protected org.objectweb.asm.MethodVisitor method(int access, String name, String descriptor, String signature, String[] exceptions, int lineNumber)
      Visits a method on the class writer and records the starting line number.
      Parameters:
      access - the method access flags
      name - the method name
      descriptor - the method descriptor
      signature - the generic signature, or null
      exceptions - the internal names of thrown exception types, or null
      lineNumber - the source line number to associate with this method
      Returns:
      the MethodVisitor for the new method

    • label

      protected org.objectweb.asm.Label label(org.objectweb.asm.MethodVisitor mv, int lineNumber)
      Creates a new label, visits it, and emits a line-number debug instruction.
      Parameters:
      mv - the method visitor
      lineNumber - the line number to associate with the label
      Returns:
      the created label

    • label

      protected org.objectweb.asm.Label label(org.objectweb.asm.MethodVisitor mv)
      Creates a new label, visits it, and emits a line-number debug instruction using the current line number.
      Parameters:
      mv - the method visitor
      Returns:
      the created label

    • label

      protected org.objectweb.asm.Label label(org.objectweb.asm.MethodVisitor mv, int lineNumber, boolean visit)
      Creates a new label and optionally visits it with a line-number debug instruction.
      Parameters:
      mv - the method visitor
      lineNumber - the line number to associate with the label
      visit - true to visit the label and emit the line number instruction
      Returns:
      the created label

    • labelNoVisit

      protected org.objectweb.asm.Label labelNoVisit(org.objectweb.asm.MethodVisitor mv)
      Creates a new label without visiting it on the method visitor.
      Parameters:
      mv - the method visitor (unused; present for API consistency)
      Returns:
      the created label
